# Models using orthogonal polynomials {#orthogonal-polynomials}

```{r orthogonal-polynomials-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/orthogonal-polynomials-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/orthogonal-polynomials/"
)
```

```{r child-orthogonal-polynomials, child="../lecture-content/17-orthogonal-polynomials.Rmd"}
```
